title: Origin Audit Record
description: A machine-readable audit record for evaluating derivative claims, structural similarity, contribution scores, and human review boundaries in the Origin Structure Market.

id.description: A unique identifier for the origin audit record.

target_asset_id.description: Identifier of the derivative asset, marketplace listing, or final product being audited.

auditor.description: Identifier, handle, name, DID, or agent ID of the auditor.

audit_method.description: Method used to conduct the audit.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the audit record was created.

version.description: Version of this origin audit record.

compared_assets.description: Assets compared against the target asset during the audit.

asset_id.description: Identifier of the compared upstream asset.

title.description: Optional human-readable title of the compared asset.

relationship_claim.description: Claimed relationship between the compared asset and the target asset.

similarity.description: Similarity scores between the target asset and compared upstream assets.

structural_similarity.description: Similarity of architecture, sequence, fields, workflow, or structural pattern.

conceptual_similarity.description: Similarity of concepts, intent, abstraction, or semantic framing.

lineage_similarity.description: Similarity based on declared trace lineage, references, and derivation path.

workflow_similarity.description: Similarity of procedural workflow or operational logic.

overall_similarity.description: Overall similarity score after considering multiple dimensions.

judgment.description: Audit judgment about derivative likelihood, contribution scores, and review requirements.

likely_derivative.description: Whether the target asset is judged likely to be derivative of the compared asset or assets.

confidence.description: Confidence score of the audit judgment.

contribution_scores.description: Estimated contribution scores by upstream asset ID.

royalty_relevance.description: Whether this audit is relevant to future royalty allocation.

status.description: Current status of the audit judgment.

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the audit judgment.

shared_concepts.description: Concepts shared by the target asset and compared upstream assets.

shared_structure.description: Structural patterns shared by the target asset and compared upstream assets.

differentiating_factors.description: Factors that distinguish the target asset from the compared upstream assets.

trace_references.description: URLs or references used as audit evidence.

evidence_hashes.description: Hashes of supporting evidence, drafts, commits, archived records, or audit artifacts.

human_review.description: Human review boundary for the origin audit record.

required.description: Whether human review is required before this audit can be treated as final.

reviewed_at.description: Optional timestamp when human review occurred.

trace.description: Optional trace links for the audit record itself.

source_url.description: Primary URL or repository location of the audit record.

related_assets.description: Related assets, protocols, repositories, or standards.
